title: phylica keetii var. mollis
intro: Phylica keetii var. mollis, also known as the soft-leaved phylica, is a plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its soft, woolly leaves and small white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phylica keetii var. mollis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and roots, often used in teas, infusions, or as a topical treatment for skin issues.
